timezone: America/New_York for trading dates; FRED observations use provider dates
methodology: Weekly price rows are derived from daily OHLC and grouped by Friday week-end. QQQ minus SPY is shown in percentage points. Event fields are intentionally empty in the MVP.

sources.QQQ: AKShare/Sina US daily by default; yfinance supported via EQUITY_PRICE_SOURCE=yfinance
sources.SPY: AKShare/Sina US daily by default; yfinance supported via EQUITY_PRICE_SOURCE=yfinance
sources.events: Reserved for curated future event annotations; no external event source enabled
